Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The original has two main paths standard and custom parallel checks for standard approval logic rejection if custom is not feasible and rework if approval is denied

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: The user wants optimization for lower turnaround time more flexibility for non standard use automation dynamic resource reallocation predictive analytics

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: I should outline the pain points of the original first to justify the changes original pain points Request type check is static custom feasibility analysis is manual approval process is sequential re evaluation loops are static all steps are rule based resource allocation is static

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Lets split the redesign into phases like Pre Processing dynamic routing automated standard path augmented custom path intelligent approval closed loop rework then post send analytics

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The original does a manual type check after receiving the request so instead at the point of request ingestion we can use a predictive model trained on historical request data and output a customization likelihood score instead of a binary type

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Replace the original XOR Check Request Type with a predictive scoring gateway if score is high route to custom if low route to standard if in between route to a hybrid pre check

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Dynamic resource reallocation the original parallel checks for standard are probably assigned to fixed teams so we can have a resource management subprocess that dynamically assigns those tasks to available agents not fixed roles

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Before a human analyst does the custom feasibility run automated checks such as configuration limits compliance and raw materials so the human only does the high judgment part

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: If we have customer credit history on file auto fill the credit check task so the agent just has to verify not do it from scratch

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The original does not define when approval is needed so we can add a predictive approval routing gateway and if the request is low risk auto approve while high risk routes to the relevant specialist manager

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: If the assigned manager is unavailable auto route to the next available manager with the right expertise and an alert instead of letting the request sit in a queue

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The original re evaluation loop does not capture why approval was denied so add a mandatory approval denial reason field and augment the rework task with that reason

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: If the custom quotation was denied because the price was too high the rework task automatically suggests price adjustment options based on historical discounts and if standard approval was denied because inventory is low calculate delivery can suggest alternative products or backorder options

Name: Counterfactual Reasoning - PE
Text: If credit check fails do we need to wait for inventory check no so replace the AND join behavior with early exit logic and only if both pass go to calculate delivery date

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The original AND join makes you wait for both even if one fails that is a waste so route to a rejection task immediately when either critical check fails

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: After custom feasibility add a new gateway Is Feasible as Is if yes prepare quotation if no go to Propose Alternative Customization Options instead of a flat rejection

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: That increases flexibility because you do not lose the customer if the exact request is not feasible and can offer alternatives

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: The parallel checks can become a reusable Standard Request Validation Subprocess and the custom feasibility and quotation can become a Custom Request Handling Subprocess

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: After the parallel checks pass calculate delivery date can be fully automated and generate final invoice can be automated by pulling quotation data tax rules and discounts

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: For the custom path prepare custom quotation can have auto populated sections using feasibility data material cost estimates and labor cost estimates from similar custom jobs

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: If there is a sudden spike in custom requests the resource management subprocess can detect backlog and reallocate cross trained agents to help with feasibility analysis and similarly cover backlogs in credit or inventory checks

Name: Backtracking - IND
Text: Wait the original process is reactive but with predictive analytics when the customer is filling out the request form the predictive model can run in real time

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: As the customer fills out the form the model can flag high custom likelihood and route straight to the custom subprocess and can also predict whether approval is likely to be needed and pre route to the right manager

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Add proactive customer updates so as soon as the request is routed send an automated message with expected turnaround times and updates if delays occur

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: That increases customer satisfaction because transparency reduces frustration even if actual processing time is the same

Name: Validation - IND
Text: Lets estimate original standard turnaround around 9 point 6 hours without approval and 13 point 6 with approval and with redesign average standard turnaround around 2 hours and custom around 6 hours

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Rejection rate for custom requests goes down because of alternative options so customer satisfaction goes up

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We also have to address tradeoffs initial setup complexity requires predictive models system integration automation setup and staff cross training with ongoing maintenance and retraining

Name: Counterfactual Reasoning - PE
Text: But the ongoing complexity is lower than the original because most steps are automated and the manual steps are higher value instead of repetitive data entry

Name: Ethical or Moral Reasoning - PE
Text: Predictive model bias could hurt some customer segments so implement model monitoring fairness checks and a manual override option

Name: Ethical or Moral Reasoning - PE
Text: Dynamic resource reallocation needs clear policies to avoid burnout and preserve employee satisfaction

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Pre Ingestion and Predictive Routing replaces original Check Request Type Augmented Standard Path modifies original standard flow Augmented Custom Path modifies original custom flow Intelligent Approval Flow replaces original approval gateway Post Approval and Customer Communication modifies original final steps

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The predictive scoring gateway replaces the static type check because the original manual review adds wait time and can misclassify requests while a model can score in less than one second and route immediately

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: For uncertain requests route them to a hybrid validation step that runs both standard and custom pre checks in parallel so time is not wasted rerouting later
